description: Slip into unparalleled comfort in these flip flops from lotto. With soft straps and a cushioned footbed, this flip flop comes with an arty upper that makes it a stylish buy. Upper Soft synthetic leather straps with a twill tape inner lining and toe separator for abrasion-free comfort and to hold the foot in place Padded and textured footbed, ergonomically curved Printed footbed for style Outsole Durable rubber outsole with ergonomically styled grooves and lugs for absolute grip and traction Slipper care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
